headline: AIG to Report First Quarter 2026 Financial Results on April 30, 2026, and Host Conference Call on May 1, 2026
summary: NEW YORK, April 06, 2026--American International Group, Inc. (NYSE: AIG) will report financial results for the first quarter ended March 31, 2026, after the market closes on Thursday, April 30, 2026. AIG’s press release and financial supplement will be available in the Investors section of AIG’s website at https://www.aig.com.

headline: US Doubles Hormuz Shipping Insurance to $40 Billion Amid Energy Disruption
summary: Expanded DFC-backed program adds major insurers to support vessels as Strait of Hormuz disruption drives global energy strain

headline: Morgan Stanley Maintains Equal-Weight on American International Gr, Lowers Price Target to $82
summary: Morgan Stanley  analyst Michael Phillips   maintains American International Gr (NYSE:AIG) with a Equal-Weight and lowers the price target from $83 to $82.

headline: AI data center boom ‘stress tests’ insurers as private capital floods in
summary: Rapid technological advancements and the huge sums of money flowing into the data center are posing both risks and rewards for insurers.
